registration.deliverable_content:
December 20, 2024

Hi Wes,

Enclosed is the information regarding your Application For Remote Seller Sales Tax with the Louisiana Department Tax Commission. We have registered your business online for a Sales Tax Account. Please see the information below regarding your online account.

  • Account Number: 000013091

  • Filing Frequency: Monthly

  • Username: Mud4683

  • Password: Salestax123

  • Security Question: What was your favorite place to visit as a child?

    • Security Answer: Seattle

Action Items:

  • Now that your registration is complete, you can begin collecting tax from your customers. If you use AvaTax to calculate taxes, follow the instructions to "Tell Us Where You Collect Tax"

  • If Avalara will file returns on your behalf, follow the instructions to "Schedule Your Returns" to activate this service.

Please note:

  • You can login to your account using the above login credentials via this link: https://remotesellersfiling.louisiana.gov/

  • If you buy items for resale, you may need to provide a resale certificate to avoid paying sales tax. This is sometimes called a reseller's permit, license, or resale license, depending on the state. Use this link to find Louisiana's resale certificate.

We do not have shared databases with the state. If you have any inquiries, including the status of your application, please reach out to the Louisiana Department of Tax Commission at (877) 693-4435 or e-mail at LARemoteSellersCommission@la.gov.

Hi Wes,

Enclosed is the information regarding your application for Request for a Business Number and Certain Program Accounts to register for a GST with the Canada Revenue Agency. We have submitted the application online. Please note the information below for your records and future use.

  • Confirmation Number: 36H5K26

  • Filing Frequency: Annually

  • Profile email id: Finance@mudmixer.com

Please Note:

  • If further information is needed you will be contacted by an agent. Otherwise, you will be contacted with your Business Number (you will receive your Business Number in 6-8 weeks) once it has been registered.

  • As of May 13, 2024, the CRA will no longer register import-export program accounts (RM). You will need to register these directly here, if applicable: https://www.cbsa-asfc.gc.ca/services/carm-gcra/menu-eng.html

  • We do not have shared databases with the authority. Should you have questions you can contact the Canada Revenue Agency Phone: Toll free (Canada/United States): 1-866-453-0452; Outside Canada/U.S. call collect: 1-613-221-3039.

  • The Canada Revenue Agency do not accept incoming emails at this time.

  • We do not share databases with the authority. Should you have any questions regarding British Columbia PST, please contact the BC Ministry of Finance at 877-388-4440.

Enclosed is the information for your Saskatchewan Provincial Sales Tax Registration. We have registered your business for a PST account online with the Saskatchewan Ministry of Finance.

  • We are currently experiencing technical difficulties on the confirmation page. However, your registration has been successfully submitted. You will receive your PST Number within 5 business days. If you do not receive it within that time, please contact the Saskatchewan Ministry of Finance.
